prompt: Create a hyper-realistic portrait of a beautiful woman with bright porcelain white skin. Create it without changing her facial features, 9:16, HD. Outfit: Wearing clothes with luxurious details, including transparent tulle gloves decorated with a sprinkle of beads or sparkling rhinestones, and an elegant pearl necklace accessory on the neck. Hair: Hair appears styled in an organized and smooth style, but most of it is covered by light effects and focus on the face. Makeup: Using glamorous and detailed facial makeup. There are sharp graphic style eyeliner accents at the corners of the eyes, and long nails with luxurious and intricate nail art designs. Pose: The subject poses very expressively with her hands in front of her face, covering part of her face with her fingers wearing a very striking and artistic large butterfly-shaped ring. Expression: Showing an intense, mysterious, and dreamy expression, with a sharp yet soft gaze penetrating between the fingers. Background: The background appears blurry and focused on artistic light effects, giving the impression of a very cinematic, ethereal, and luxurious atmosphere. Lighting: The lighting used is very dramatic with flare and soft glow effects, creating a magical atmosphere and highlighting the texture of the beads and details of the butterfly jewelry with a stunning sparkle.
